title: Wholesome Silky Australian Sardines Tagliere
description: A whole30-friendly grassy and silky dish featuring air-fried sardines for a date-night treat.

ingredients.name: 1 can of drained and rinsed black beans

instructions: Coarsely chop the cooked quinoa and mix it with half a can of drained and rinsed black beans.
Core the avocados, remove the pit, and cut them into small cubes. Mix these with the quinoa-black bean mixture.
Place whole sardines on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush the lemon juice over them to help crisp them up slightly.
Drizzle both lime juices over the mixture of avocado and quinoa. Add salt to taste.
Sprinkle the remaining black beans evenly across the top of the fish, followed by the chopped cilantro for a touch of freshness.
Air fry the sardines for 20 minutes or until golden brown on all sides, shaking the pan halfway through cooking.
